div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 24px; height: 1px; padding-top: 26px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 8px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
